body.receipt_selection: if checkpoint.tsa_receipts is a list, convert each object entry to a receipt and each non-object to an invalid marker; if that yields any receipts, use them and ignore legacy tsa; otherwise if checkpoint.tsa is an object with string receipt_b64, use that single legacy receipt; otherwise no TSA claim is emitted
body.receipt_label: receipt.provider if truthy else receipt.url if truthy else receipt N
body.check_tsa_false: receipt is recorded checked=false, reason skipped, and no imprint parse is performed
body.receipt_b64_missing: receipt without string receipt_b64 fails with the invalid marker or receipt_b64 missing

der_parser.lengths: DER definite lengths only; indefinite length, high-tag-number, non-minimal long-form length, truncated values, and child parse mismatch fail
der_parser.path: ContentInfo SEQUENCE -> second child explicit context -> signedData SEQUENCE -> third child encapContentInfo SEQUENCE -> context-specific constructed tag 0 from encap children after the content type -> explicit OCTET STRING -> TSTInfo SEQUENCE -> third child messageImprint SEQUENCE -> second child OCTET STRING hashedMessage
der_parser.tsa_certificate_chain: not validated by current verifier; --tsa-ca-bundle only prints an out-of-scope note in human CLI

body.success_rule: hashedMessage bytes must equal expected_imprint bytes exactly
body.failure_rule: parse failure or mismatch gives CHECKPOINT_TSA_IMPRINT_MISMATCH/disproved
